evidence: The official NBS 2021 expenditure-GDP release was acquired.
The report presents household consumption as an aggregate GDP-expenditure component, not twelve purposes.
The official download is a PDF report and does not expose a machine-readable purpose matrix.
The consumption-pattern publication is household survey evidence, not national-accounts S14/P31.
The detailed consumption study refers to 2019 rather than 2021.
The reviewed official sources separate a 2021 aggregate national-accounts component from wrong-period household-survey detail; neither is an exact twelve-purpose matrix.
